error_patterns.root_cause: Bitbucket API 429 Too Many Requests — rate limit hit during toolkit initialization (cloud_api_wrapper.py:343 __init__) or during tool execution. The entire Bitbucket test suite is throttled by the shared API token.

blocked.title: Bitbucket toolkit initialization crashes on 429 — no retry/backoff in cloud_api_wrapper.__init__
blocked.description: BitbucketCloudApi.__init__ calls workspace.repositories.get() at construction time with no retry logic. A 429 response causes an immediate ToolException, leaving the toolkit with no tools. All 21 tests are blocked by this shared rate-limit exhaustion.

commit_info.skip_reason: No test code fixes applied — all failures are rate-limit driven (flaky or sdk_bug)
